hub.title: Open-Source LLM Economics: Pricing, Incentives, and Sustainable Compute
hub.summary: A macro-level framework for understanding who pays for open-source LLM development and deployment, how costs scale with training and inference, which incentive models sustain maintainers, and how license and deployment choices affect pricing, moat dynamics, and ecosystem growth.

spokes.title: Training Cost Curves and Scaling Laws for Open-Source Models
spokes.topicEntity: Training cost modeling and scaling economics
spokes.summary: Practical methods to estimate training budgets using token compute assumptions, hardware utilization, and scaling-law-informed projections—plus how to translate these into roadmap decisions for open-source teams.
spokes.anchorToHub: link budget-to-roadmap economic reasoning in Open-Source LLM Economics
spokes.hubAnchorToSpoke: training cost curves and scaling-law-based budgeting for open-source model roadmaps

spokes.title: Inference Pricing Models and Unit Economics (Per-Token, Per-Request, and SLA)
spokes.topicEntity: Inference unit economics and pricing strategy
spokes.summary: A guide to calculate real unit costs for serving LLMs (GPU time, batching, networking, caching, and concurrency) and map them to pricing approaches such as per-token, per-request, and SLA-based tiers for open-source deployments.
spokes.anchorToHub: unit economics for serving open-source LLMs within the Open-Source LLM Economics framework
spokes.hubAnchorToSpoke: inference pricing models and unit economics for running open-source LLMs

spokes.title: Licensing Incentives, Ecosystem Moats, and Contributor Sustainability
spokes.summary: How open-source licenses and governance choices influence adoption, commercial extraction, and contributor motivation—covering incentives for maintainers, funding paths, and where durable differentiation comes from beyond weights.
spokes.anchorToHub: licensing and incentive economics in Open-Source LLM Economics
spokes.hubAnchorToSpoke: licensing incentives, ecosystem moats, and contributor sustainability
